case_memory.problem_summary: 67 yo woman with past medical history of endometrial adenocarcinoma s/p TAH BSO and hypothyroidism, presenting with constipation, diarrhea with mucus, cramping abdominal pain, lightheadedness, syncope, and right ankle fracture.
case_memory.current_turn:
turn_2: I’ve been constipated for 12 days, and in the past few days, I’ve also had diarrhea that looks like it has mucus. I’m not experiencing any blood in my stool or toilet bowl. I’ve also been having cramping pain in my lower abdomen for about a month, which gets worse when I strain to have a bowel movement — especially after taking Miralax and Mag Citrate. 

A few days ago, while straining, I felt lightheaded, then lost consciousness. I was on the floor for about an hour before my husband found me. When I came to, I felt like my ankle was breaking — I ended up with a right ankle fracture. ...[truncated]
